subcodes.first_line: O renowned and respected personage! Though to outward seeming it appears we are far removed from one another
subcodes.first_line_orig: شخص شهیر محترما هر چند بظاهر مفارقت حاصل ولی بحقیقت همیشه با یکدیگر بدل موانس
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
